stories.title: Apply missing migration to staging (change_summary column)
acceptance: Migration 20260124100002 applied to staging database
organization_enrichment table has enrichment_version, previous_hash, change_summary columns
PostgREST schema cache reloaded

stories.title: Make deep-enrich-organization resilient to missing columns
acceptance: Edge function handles missing columns gracefully — tries update with all columns, falls back to update without version columns if PostgREST rejects
No crash when enrichment_version/previous_hash/change_summary columns are absent
Logs a warning when fallback is used

stories.title: Add Gemini Search fallback when website scraping fails
acceptance: When scrapeWebsite() throws (zero pages scraped), automatically call executeGeminiSearch() as fallback
Gemini Search results are fed through the same extractCompanyData() pipeline
Enrichment succeeds for websites that block direct scraping (e.g. Cloudflare-protected sites)
Logs clearly indicate when fallback was used
If Gemini Search also fails, original error is preserved

stories.title: Add scraping quality threshold and logging
acceptance: fetchPage() logs non-200 responses (status code + URL) instead of silently skipping
After scraping, if less than 2 pages or less than 1000 chars total, trigger Gemini Search fallback
Enrichment record includes metadata about data source (scraped vs search vs mixed)

stories.title: Update password reset email template to match welcome template
acceptance: Password reset email has same dark theme, logo, and green CTA as welcome email
Template stored in encharge_email_templates table
Migration to update the template if needed

stories.title: Scan for similar schema cache / missing column bugs
acceptance: All edge functions checked for columns that may not exist on staging
All unapplied migrations identified
Report of any edge function that references columns not in baseline schema

stories.title: Deploy all edge function changes to staging
acceptance: deep-enrich-organization deployed to staging with --no-verify-jwt
All modified edge functions deployed
Enrichment tested with a known-blocked website
